summary: Iteration 81 - 5 Critical UX Fixes for LEAMSS Immigration Portal. Backend: 28/28 tests PASSED. All new endpoints working: document download (Partner+Admin), proposal-consent, partner/submit-final, updated mock-pay-proposal (requires consent), updated admin/approve-final (accepts both stages), updated admin/queue (includes awaiting_final_approval). Full E2E flow verified with new stage. Frontend: Partner Pipeline shows View/Save buttons on documents, 'Waiting for Client Payment' banner on proposal_sent, 'Action: Upload Receipt + Agreement' badge on proposal_paid. Admin Queue has view toggles (1st/2nd Approval), filter banners, and 1st Approval view shows history.
feature: 5 Critical UX Fixes: (1) Partner+Admin can View/Download documents, (2) Admin 1st Approval shows history, (3) Partner card shows 'Waiting for Client Payment' badge, (4) Client must consent before paying, (5) NEW STAGE 'awaiting_final_approval' between proposal_paid and case_created

frontend_tests.admin_queue_filter_banner: PASS - Filter active banner with Clear filter button
frontend_tests.admin_queue_1st_approval_history: PASS - Shows CASE CREATED, PROPOSAL PAID items (history)
frontend_tests.admin_queue_2nd_approval_view: PASS - Filter banner shows 'create case & assign CM'
frontend_tests.admin_home_action_cards: PASS - Cases unassigned action card visible

critical_code_review_comments: FunnelProgress.jsx correctly includes 'awaiting_final_approval' in step matching
AdminHome.jsx correctly counts awaiting_final_approval for second_approval_pending
PreAssessmentQueue.jsx correctly shows both proposal_paid and awaiting_final_approval in 2nd Approval view
PreAssessmentMiniPortal.jsx correctly handles proposal_paid and awaiting_final_approval stage cards

success_rate.frontend: 90% - All critical UI elements verified except Client MiniPortal (client has active case)

seed_data_creation: Created 3 test PAs during testing: TEST_Iteration81_Client (case_created), TEST_NoDocs_Client (new), TEST_BackwardCompat_Client (case_created)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Iteration 81 verified 5 critical UX fixes. Key features: (1) GET /api/pre-assessment/{pa_id}/document/{doc_id}/download - Partner+Admin can download docs; (2) POST /api/pre-assess-portal/client/proposal-consent/{pa_id} - Client must consent before paying; (3) POST /api/pre-assess-portal/partner/submit-final/{pa_id} - Partner submits receipt+agreement after client pays; (4) NEW STAGE 'awaiting_final_approval' between proposal_paid and case_created; (5) Admin queue includes awaiting_final_approval items. Frontend: Partner Pipeline has View/Save buttons on docs, 'Waiting for Client Payment' banner, 'Upload Receipt + Agreement' action. Admin Queue has 1st/2nd Approval view toggles with filter banners. Client MiniPortal has consent checkbox flow and stage cards for proposal_paid/awaiting_final_approval.

new_stage_flow.description: New 2-step flow after client pays main fee
steps: 2. Partner uploads receipt + agreement + basic docs
1. Client views proposal at proposal_sent stage
2. Client checks consent checkbox and clicks 'I Agree — Unlock Payment'
